displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen
synopsis: "The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen" is a seven-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series that takes place prior to the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series episode "Downfall of a Droid." Posted on StarWars.com on November 7, 2008, the comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated by Thomas Hodges, and lettered by Grant Gould. "The Fall of Falleen" depicts the actions of Asajj Ventress and Count Dooku during the final act of a battle on the planet of Falleen.
title: The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen
